zh.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote是Simon Basset 2nd Lord Basset of Sapcote的兒子，於1315年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特。他於1337年與Sibyl de Astley結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年7月17日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾卡素 白坦。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote was born in 1315, in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Simon Basset 2nd Lord Basset of Sapcote. He married Sibyl de Astley in 1337. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 17 July 1378, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote est né en 1315, à Sapcote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Simon Basset 2nd Lord Basset of Sapcote. Il a épousé Sibyl de Astley en 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1378, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote è nato il nel 1315 nel Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Simon Basset 2nd Lord Basset of Sapcote. Lui sposato Sibyl de Astley nel 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 17 luglio 1378, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcoteは1315年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアサプコトでSimon Basset 2nd Lord Basset of Sapcoteの息子として生まれた。1337年にSibyl de Astleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年7月17日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアカストル ブイサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote(은)는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 사p컷에서 Simon Basset 2nd Lord Basset of Sapcote의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1337년 Sibyl de Astley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 7월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 카스틀 비섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote nasceu em 1315, em Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Simon Basset 2nd Lord Basset of Sapcote. Ele casou-se com Sibyl de Astley em 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1378, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote родился в 1315 г. в местности сапкот, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Simon Basset 2nd Lord Basset of Sapcote. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl de Astley в 1337 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 17 июля 1378 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности кастл битам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
